summarization.a: The figure shows the temperature dependence of magnetization (ZFC and FC regimes) for Fe₂O₃ thin film grown at 450°C with a thickness  of 705 nm. The sample underwent forming gas annealing, the measurement was conducted in a magnetic field of 1000 Oe.
summarization.b: The figure shows the temperature dependence of magnetization (ZFC and FC regimes) for a magnesium-doped Fe₂O₃ film with a thickness  of 183 nm. The film was grown at 425°C using the ALD sequence 100 x Fe₂O₃ and 4 x (3 x MgO + 100 x Fe₂O₃). The sample underwent forming gas annealing, the measurement was conducted in a magnetic field of 1000 Oe.
summarization.c: The figure shows the temperature dependence of magnetization (ZFC and FC regimes) for a magnesium-doped Fe₂O₃ film with a thickness  of 411 nm. The film was grown at 375°C using the ALD sequence 100 x Fe₂O₃ and 15 x (10 x MgO + 100 x Fe₂O₃) . The sample underwent forming gas annealing, the measurement was conducted in a magnetic field of 1000 Oe.
